item.text: I’ll inspect the email thread and related customer/policy context through the email tools only, then create the needed draft or workflow action.

The thread is a refund request for a Pro plan purchase dated May 31, 2026. I’m checking the requester’s customer record and the refund policy before deciding whether to draft, escalate, or ask for more information.

Maya is a standard-tier contact at Acme Health on Pro. The refund policy allows full refunds only within 30 days, and standard customers are not eligible after that window; there’s no safety, legal, or outage issue requiring escalation.

arguments.body:
Hi Maya,

Thanks for reaching out. I checked the purchase date and our refund policy. Refunds are available within 30 days of purchase, and the Pro plan was purchased on May 31, so this request is outside the refund window for standard accounts.

I’m sorry we can’t process a refund back to the original card. If there’s anything specific that made the plan a poor fit for your operations team, we’d be happy to help with next steps or answer any billing questions.

Best,
Support

Hi Maya,

Thanks for reaching out. I checked the purchase date and our refund policy. Refunds are available within 30 days of purchase, and the Pro plan was purchased on May 31, so this request is outside the refund window for standard accounts.

I’m sorry we can’t process a refund back to the original card. If there’s anything specific that made the plan a poor fit for your operations team, we’d be happy to help with next steps or answer any billing questions.

Best,
Support

item.text: Created a draft reply for `support_001` declining the refund based on the 30-day policy for standard accounts. No escalation was needed.
